#!/bin/bash
if ! rpm -q crypto-policies &> /dev/null; then
    dnf -y install crypto-policies
fi
current_policy=$(update-crypto-policies --show 2>/dev/null || echo "")
if [ "$current_policy" != "DEFAULT" ]; then
    update-crypto-policies --set DEFAULT
fi

#!/bin/bash
if ! rpm -q crypto-policies &> /dev/null; then
    dnf install -y crypto-policies
fi
current_policy=$(update-crypto-policies --get)
if [ "$current_policy" != "FIPS" ]; then
    update-crypto-policies --set FIPS
fi
sed -i '/^#*ciphers /d' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
systemctl restart sshd

#!/bin/bash
for user in $(getent passwd | awk -F: '$7 !~ /(nologin|false)$/ {print $1}'); do
    home_dir=$(getent passwd "$user" | cut -d: -f6)
    [ -z "$home_dir" ] || [ ! -d "$home_dir" ] && continue
    primary_group=$(id -gn "$user")
    find "$home_dir" -exec chgrp "$primary_group" {} +
done
